title: Basis Risk: Calculate the effective price received by a company that hedges...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: Calculate the effective price received by a company that hedges its commodity sale. If the spot price is $53 and the futures price is $64, what is the price received? (Assume the futures position is closed out.)

options.text: The effective price received by the company is $53 (spot price) + ($64 - $54)
A forward contract to lock in the exchange rate

solution: The effective price received by the company is $53 (spot price) + ($64 - $54) (gain on the futures position), totaling $63.
